title: YOOYID Army Toy for Boys 3 Years Old Military Toy Tank with Diecast Alloy Army Vehicles, Sound Light Missile Launcher Tank Vehicle Gift for Kids Boys 3 4 5 6 7 Years Old
features: 【Military Tank Base for boys 3 years up 】This military themed toy playset comes with a large size tank and 6 military vehicles, play as military operations pretend play game for boys who like milirary battle play game. Include a large capacity tank which has storage design, 6 military vehicles and realistic accessories. Let your kids completely arrange your military deployment and enjoy military games.

【Double Game Models】There are 2 mode for kids to play military game. One is tank mode that the turret can be rotated 360°and can swing up and down 40°, press the button of the barrel to launch the missile just as realistic missile launching vehicle. another mode is army base mode, kids age 4 5 6 7 8 will put mini army alloy truck on the track and catapult the alloy cars out form the track.
【Military Toy with Realistic Sound & Light】3 different sound and the flash light for entertaining your little soldier, keep them busy and occupied for multi hours of battle game play.

【Safe Material Durable】Made of high-quality metal and plastic materials. Strong material which makes it impact-proof and difficult to break, non-toxic odor-free, safe for your kids. Not recommended for children under 3 years of age. 2 AA batteries required (NOT included)

【Endless Fun】With different types of military vehicles, kids will learn the characteristics of various vehicles while playing, It is ideal for boosting your child’s cognitive development, develop their hands-on skills, hand-eye coordination and creativity! Great birthday gift for boys age 3-6 years
description: Product Description Requires a screwdriver to open the battery cover Can match building block man Storage Military Accessories Comes with 6 Alloy Military Vehicles and Accessories
